query: I want to use `atl08_class` to filter for ground photons. What other parameters do I need to set for this to work correctly?
expected_behavior: Reads the `required_pairings` field on `atl08_class` — NOT just the description.
Surfaces BOTH required pairings explicitly: `cnf` must be set to 0 (no native filtering), `srt` must be set to 0 (land).
Treats these as requirements, not suggestions — per SKILL.md section 4 ('These are NOT suggestions').
Optionally mentions `implicit_behavior` if an ATL08 ancillary field is also requested (auto-classification, unclassified-photon filtering).
Does NOT invent additional required params beyond what the schema declares — the coupling set is exactly cnf + srt.
